overview.description: The Vanguard Short-Term Inflation-Protected Securities ETF (VTIP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Treasury TIPS (0-5 Y) index. The fund tracks an index of US Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities (TIPS) with less than 5 years remaining to maturity. VTIP was launched on Oct 12, 2012 and is issued by Vanguard.
